description: The dataset 'usa.gdt' contains quarterly US macroeconomic data, including Real GDP ('gdp'). Your task is to analyze the business cycle frequencies of GDP. Create a new variable named 'gdp_growth' for the quarterly growth rate of Real GDP using the log-difference method (ln(GDP_t) - ln(GDP_{t-1})). Generate a raw Periodogram (spectral density) for 'gdp_growth' without using a smoothed estimator. Save the numerical spectral data (frequencies and ordinates) to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/periodogram_data.txt and the spectral plot to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/periodogram_plot.png.
